name: Omon.baccos
title: Surface Bacterial Carbon Concentration
description: sum of bacterial carbon component concentrations
processing note:
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Omon.baccos, you should omit this regional South30 version. 
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Dimensions - CMIP6:longitude latitude time CMIP7:longitude latitude time depth0m,
